title: Shirahoshi Leaves the Tower
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Fish-Men, Zoro, New Fish-Man Pirates, Narrator, King Neptune, Royal Guards. The core story beat is shirahoshi leaves the tower.
scene: The scene centers on shirahoshi leaves the tower, with Unknown person #1, Fish-Men, Zoro, New Fish-Man Pirates, Narrator, King Neptune, Royal Guards driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: How is a human able to move faster than a fishman underwater?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the heck is that guy?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: All right, meeeen!!! We are not letting that swordsman escape!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is this UN- Naturally twisted aura?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As I thought, I must evacuate all my men from the palace...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: One-eyed swordsman! It will not be long before the entire palace is sub- merged!! Grab onto my body!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now it is just a question of how long my poor old back will hold out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am going to make a path! Come, my soldiers! This is not the time to fight!! Flee the palace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...why, those...!! They're running away without even fighting us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're out of the castle!! Keep on going straight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: . Get a hold of yourself!! Please!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! How cruel the bonds of age can be!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My body...!! UNghh... It will not move!!

summary: Shirahoshi Leaves the Tower. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
